codeReview.summary: The commit stays within the requested lint-only scope. It replaces the two verbose registry static types with local aliases and removes a redundant borrow when building per-field crypto contexts; the resulting code preserves the same registry contents, initialization flow, and default-resolution behavior already implemented in core/src/crypto.rs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill still mandates adding or updating focused failing tests first, but this clippy-only feature correctly used lint reproduction plus validator reruns instead of inventing a behavior-changing test. The skill should explicitly call out lint-only fixes as an allowed exception.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: C:\Users\admin\appdb\.factory\skills\rust-library-worker\SKILL.md step 4 requires failing tests first, while worker session 0f8c237c-ce4f-411f-a26b-9e8a1e453da5 and handoff.skillFeedback document a clippy-only compliance fix with no runtime behavior change.

summary: Pass: reviewed the feature record, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, current source, mission AGENTS, services.yaml, library notes, and related scrutiny reports. The change is a scoped clippy refactor in core/src/crypto.rs with no behavioral regressions evident from the diff or source inspection; only a skill-procedure documentation gap was noted.
